tasks.title: Complete Topic Progress Data Model and Storage Integration
tasks.description: Enhance the data model for topics progress in src/models and ensure DatabaseService supports CRUD operations for topicsProgress. Modify src/services/storage/Database.ts to add methods for topicsProgress retrieval and updates. Ensure data consistency and proper typing.
acceptanceCriteria: DatabaseService supports getAll, put, add, and delete for topicsProgress
Topics progress data model is defined with necessary fields like topicId, progressPercent, lastReviewedAt
tasks.expectedResult: Topics progress data model and database integration are implemented and tested

outputPlan.description: Add or update topicsProgress data model definitions
Add CRUD methods for topicsProgress data

evidence: file diff for models and database service
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational data support for topics progress tracking

tasks.title: Implement Topics Progress UI Component in src/pages/TopicsProgress.tsx
tasks.description: Create a new React component src/pages/TopicsProgress.tsx that displays the user's progress on various topics. Use charts (e.g., progress bars or pie charts) to visualize completion percentages. Fetch topicsProgress data from DatabaseService and update UI reactively. Include filtering and sorting by progress or topic name.
acceptanceCriteria: TopicsProgress component fetches and displays topics progress data
UI includes visual progress indicators and supports sorting/filtering
Component integrates with existing app routing and styling conventions
tasks.expectedResult: TopicsProgress UI component is implemented, integrated, and tested

outputPlan.description: React component for displaying topics progress with charts and filters

metadata.inputContext: Topics progress data model and database service methods
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides users with a visual overview of their topic progress

tasks.title: Enhance Progress Page Data Aggregation and Visualization
tasks.description: In src/pages/Progress.tsx, complete the data aggregation logic to compute progress metrics for topics and overall study progress. Integrate topicsProgress data into the progress charts and summaries. Add new charts or tables to visualize topic completion rates and progress trends over time. Ensure data is fetched efficiently and UI updates reactively.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress page includes topics progress metrics and visualizations
Charts update correctly based on aggregated data
Performance is acceptable with large data sets
tasks.expectedResult: Progress page fully integrates topics progress data and visualizes it

outputPlan.description: Add topics progress data aggregation and visualization to progress page

metadata.inputContext: Topics progress data and existing progress page code
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Completes the progress tracking feature with topic-level insights

tasks.title: Add Unit and Integration Tests for Topics Progress Features
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for the topicsProgress data model, database service methods, and UI components (TopicsProgress.tsx and Progress.tsx enhancements). Include integration tests to verify data flow from storage to UI. Use mocks and fixtures to simulate various progress states and edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all new data model and service methods
UI component tests cover rendering and user interactions
Integration tests verify end-to-end data flow
Test coverage for topics progress features is above 90%
tasks.expectedResult: Topics progress features are fully tested with high coverage

outputPlan.description: Add tests for Progress page enhancements
Add tests for topicsProgress database methods

metadata.inputContext: New topics progress code and existing test infrastructure
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliability and correctness of topics progress features
